title: limnanthes floccosa
intro: Limnanthes floccosa, also known as the marsh marigold or flannel flower, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limnanthes floccosa include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
